use_cases: User account menus with profile options, settings, and logout actions
Settings panels with grouped navigation and nested submenus
Table row action menus with edit, delete, and duplicate options
Filter menus with checkboxes for multi-select filtering
Navigation menus with categorized links and icons
ai_summary: A headless, accessible dropdown menu component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth open/close animations, keyboard navigation support, and portal rendering. Supports any content type including text, icons, checkboxes, and nested submenus. Styled with Tailwind CSS using standard animation classes for fade, zoom, and slide transitions.
